ruleScores.ruleName: Every Rule Has Severity and Enforcement
Every Rule Has a Bad → Good Example
Agent Document Has Version and Last-Updated

strengths: Complete structural compliance with all 7 required sections (Meta, Purpose, Applicability, Rules, Exceptions, Checklist, Tool Integration)
All 8 rules properly formatted with severity [BLOCKER/CRITICAL/WARNING] and enforcement [BLOCKED/PREVENTED/REVIEWED] labels
Excellent rule count of 8 rules - well within the 5-9 bounds and appropriately focused
Every rule includes concrete Bad → Good examples with clear violation/correction pairs
Comprehensive boundary definitions in related section with explicit handoffs to Architecture and Security agents
Specific enforcement tools named throughout (CI Pipeline, Coverage Tool, PR Review, Test Metrics, Test Framework, SonarQube, Manual Review)
Proper versioning with version 1.0 and last_updated 2026-04-09 in YAML frontmatter
Checklist has exactly 8 items matching the 8 rules in correct order
